name: Fengyou Liu
taglines: "Making electrons do useless things — some more useless than others."
"I build things that fly, things that think, and things nobody asked for."
"Somewhere between the schematic and the crash log is where I live."
"If it doesn't have a battery, I'm probably not interested."
"Building at the edge of hardware and sky."
bio: I build things at the intersection of hardware and software — systems that move, sense, and think. Currently studying Electrical & Aerospace Engineering at Princeton, trying to make electrons do interesting things.
